name: chaingammon
description: Monorepo for the Chaingammon project, including local agent processes, contracts, and frontend.

scripts.contracts:deploy: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.contracts:verify: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/verify.js --network sepolia
scripts.contracts:deploy:base-sepolia: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/deploy.js --network base-sepolia
scripts.contracts:deploy:avalanche-fuji: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/deploy.js --network avalanche-fuji
scripts.contracts:deploy:polygon-amoy: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/deploy.js --network polygon-amoy
scripts.contracts:deploy:optimism-sepolia: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/deploy.js --network optimism-sepolia
scripts.contracts:deploy:multichain: pnpm contracts:deploy:base-sepolia && pnpm contracts:deploy:avalanche-fuji && pnpm contracts:deploy:polygon-amoy && pnpm contracts:deploy:optimism-sepolia
scripts.agent:test: cd agent && uv run pytest tests/
scripts.test: pnpm agent:test && pnpm --filter contracts test && pnpm --filter frontend test
